name: Lightning Spell VFX
description: A jagged lightning bolt effect: a procedurally jagged line/geometry from origin to target, branching forks, an electric glow, a flash of light, and a sharp crackle sound cue. Uses Three.js Line2 or custom geometry with additive blending.

requiredElements.name: jagged-bolt
requiredElements.description: A main bolt path from origin to target with midpoints displaced perpendicularly by noise to create jaggedness (>=5 segments).

requiredElements.name: branch-forks
requiredElements.description: At least 1-2 fork branches that split off the main bolt and terminate early, scaling down.

requiredElements.name: electric-glow
requiredElements.description: An additive glow sheath around the bolt (a wider, lower-opacity duplicate or a fat-line material).

requiredElements.name: impact-flash
requiredElements.description: A bright flash at the target endpoint on arrival, expanding and fading within ~150ms.

requiredElements.name: short-duration
requiredElements.description: The bolt is visible for a short, snappy duration (<=300ms) with rapid fade; lightning is instantaneous, not lingering.

optionalElements.name: afterglow-arc
optionalElements.description: A faint lingering arc that fades over ~500ms after the bolt disappears.

optionalElements.name: ground-scorch
optionalElements.description: A decal/scorched texture at the impact point.

optionalElements.name: chain-targets
optionalElements.description: Lightning arcs to additional nearby targets (chain lightning).

qualityRules.description: Bolt has visible jagged displacement, not a straight line.
Glow sheath gives the bolt volume and electric intensity.
Color reads as electric (white-blue core, blue-violet glow).
Bolt appears and fades within the short-duration window; no slow linger.
Forks fade in sync with or slightly before the main bolt.
Bolt geometry is rebuilt/regenerated per cast (jaggedness randomized), not a static asset.
Segment count bounded (<=24 main, <=8 per fork) to keep line draw cheap.

antiPatterns.description: A perfectly straight line with no jagged displacement reads as a laser, not lightning.
A lightning bolt that stays visible for seconds looks like a beam weapon, breaking the instantaneous feel.
Reusing one fixed jagged path for every cast looks repetitive; jaggedness should randomize.
Excessive forking (>4) clutters and costs perf without improving the read.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a faint afterglow arc for a more satisfying tail.
Add chain-lightning arcing to secondary targets.

exampleOutputs.label: Jagged bolt geometry builder
